plan.annotation: Measured timing reflects one frozen product-demo workflow receipt; the broader safety claim rests on review before acceptance, not on the timing alone.

operations.label: Dominant thesis
operations.value: Reviewable generation makes presentation automation safer

operations.label: Bound evidence
operations.value: Workflow receipt: 52 seconds to human acceptance, 58 seconds to PowerPoint export

operations.label: Negative space
operations.value: Single focal center with generous whitespace; no card grid

plan.pptxFallback: Thesis and measured timing remain editable text in PowerPoint; decorative media is removed before any evidence is rasterized.
plan.takeaway: Human review before acceptance: 52 seconds to human acceptance, 58 seconds to PowerPoint export.
plan.title: Reviewable generation makes presentation automation safer
